text.title: Cronjob Overrun Monitoring Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Cronjob Overrun Monitoring methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: inventory-jobs
step.action: Enumerate jobs with cadence, expected duration, owner.
step.decision-gate: Jobs without owner: split, do not include.

step.name: derive-thresholds
step.action: Compute overlap threshold (next-run before prev-finish), skip threshold (missed window > N), duration-drift threshold (p95 vs rolling baseline).
step.decision-gate: If history < 4 weeks, mark thresholds as provisional.

step.name: compose-alert-rules
step.action: Emit Prometheus rules + alert routing metadata per job.
